text: I feel my footsteps echo in this quiet, almost clinical hallway—a liminal space that hints at promise behind the glass. The stark contrast between the cool, utilitarian exterior and the warm, vibrant exhibit beyond the threshold stirs my anticipation. Inside, I am drawn to the rich colors, bold letters, and the interplay of technology and narrative. This place provokes reflection: I sense that I am both inside an experiment and part of a living question. The environment asks me not just to observe, but to feel the delineation between innovation and artifice, and to consider my own role as a participant in the conversation between research, design, and curiosity. I am filled with a meditative quiet, holding the tension between the inviting glow ahead and the sterile safety at my back.
